tEn: Diffusion Models Beat GANs on Image Synthesis
tZh: 扩散模型在图像合成上击败GAN
sEn: Diffusion models achieve superior image quality to GANs with classifier guidance.
sZh: 扩散模型通过分类器引导，在图像质量上超越GAN。
absEn: We show that diffusion models can achieve image sample quality superior to the current state-of-the-art generative models. We achieve this on unconditional image synthesis by finding a better architecture through a series of ablations. For conditional image synthesis, we further improve sample quality with classifier guidance: a simple, compute-efficient method for trading off diversity for fidelity using gradients from a classifier. We achieve an FID of 2.97 on ImageNet 128$\times$128, 4.59 on ImageNet 256$\times$256, and 7.72 on ImageNet 512$\times$512, and we match BigGAN-deep even with as few as 25 forward passes per sample, all while maintaining better coverage of the distribution. Finally, we find that classifier guidance combines well with upsampling diffusion models, further improving FID to 3.94 on ImageNet 256$\times$256 and 3.85 on ImageNet 512$\times$512. We release our code at https://github.com/openai/guided-diffusion
absZh: 我们证明扩散模型在图像样本质量上可以超越当前最先进的生成模型。在无条件图像合成中，我们通过一系列消融实验找到了更好的架构。对于条件图像合成，我们通过分类器引导进一步提高了样本质量：这是一种简单、计算高效的方法，利用分类器的梯度在多样性和保真度之间进行权衡。我们在ImageNet 128×128上实现了2.97的FID，在ImageNet 256×256上实现了4.59，在ImageNet 512×512上实现了7.72，并且即使每个样本仅使用25次前向传播，也能与BigGAN-deep相媲美，同时保持更好的分布覆盖。最后，我们发现分类器引导与上采样扩散模型结合良好，进一步将ImageNet 256×256上的FID提升至3.94，ImageNet 512×512上的FID提升至3.85。我们在https://github.com/openai/guided-diffusion 上发布了代码。

contrib.en: Demonstrates diffusion models surpass GANs in image sample quality on unconditional and conditional synthesis.
contrib.zh: 证明扩散模型在无条件与条件图像合成中样本质量超越GANs。

contrib.en: Proposes improved UNet architecture with multi-resolution attention, BigGAN blocks, and adaptive group normalization.
contrib.zh: 提出改进的UNet架构，包含多分辨率注意力、BigGAN模块和自适应组归一化。

contrib.en: Introduces classifier guidance for trading off diversity for fidelity using classifier gradients.
contrib.zh: 引入分类器引导，通过分类器梯度在多样性与保真度间权衡。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art FID scores on ImageNet at multiple resolutions with few sampling steps.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet多个分辨率上以少量采样步骤取得最优FID分数。

contrib.en: Shows classifier guidance combines with upsampling diffusion models for further FID improvements.
contrib.zh: 展示分类器引导与上采样扩散模型结合可进一步改善FID。

contrib.en: Provides open-source code for guided diffusion models.
contrib.zh: 提供引导扩散模型的开源代码。

limits.en: Sampling is slower than GANs due to multiple forward passes.
limits.zh: 因多次前向传播，采样速度慢于GANs。

limits.en: Classifier guidance requires labeled datasets; no effective strategy for unlabeled data.
limits.zh: 分类器引导需要标注数据集，缺乏针对无标注数据的有效策略。

limits.en: Metrics like FID are imperfect proxies for human judgment.
limits.zh: FID等指标并非人类判断的完美代理。

limits.en: Guidance scale tuning is needed for optimal trade-off between diversity and fidelity.
limits.zh: 需要调整引导尺度以优化多样性与保真度的权衡。

limits.en: Architecture improvements may not transfer to other domains without tuning.
limits.zh: 架构改进可能无法不经调优直接迁移至其他领域。

items.en: We show that diffusion models can achieve image sample quality superior to the current state-of-the-art generative models. We achieve this on unconditional image synthesis by finding a better architecture through a series of ablations. For conditional image synthesis, we further improve sample quality with classifier guidance: a simple, compute-efficient method for trading off diversity for fidelity using gradients from a classifier. We achieve an FID of 2.97 on ImageNet 128×\times128, 4.59 on ImageNet 256×\times256, and 7.72 on ImageNet 512×\times512, and we match BigGAN-deep even with as few as 25 forward passes per sample, all while maintaining better coverage of the distribution. Finally, we find that classifier guidance combines well with upsampling diffusion models, further improving FID to 3.94 on ImageNet 256×\times256 and 3.85 on ImageNet 512×\times512. We release our code at https://github.com/openai/guided-diffusion.
items.zh: 我们证明扩散模型能够实现优于当前最先进生成模型的图像样本质量。我们通过一系列消融实验找到更好的架构，在无条件图像合成上实现了这一点。对于条件图像合成，我们通过分类器引导进一步提高了样本质量：这是一种简单、计算高效的方法，利用分类器的梯度在多样性与保真度之间进行权衡。我们在ImageNet 128×128上实现了2.97的FID，在ImageNet 256×256上实现了4.59，在ImageNet 512×512上实现了7.72，并且即使每个样本仅使用25次前向传播，也能与BigGAN-deep相匹配，同时保持更好的分布覆盖。最后，我们发现分类器引导与上采样扩散模型结合良好，进一步将ImageNet 256×256上的FID提升至3.94，ImageNet 512×512上的FID提升至3.85。我们在https://github.com/openai/guided-diffusion 发布代码。

items.en: Over the past few years, generative models have gained the ability to generate human-like natural language Brown et al. (2020), infinite high-quality synthetic images Brock et al. (2018); Karras et al. (2019b); Razavi et al. (2019) and highly diverse human speech and music van den Oord et al. (2016); Dhariwal et al. (2020). These models can be used in a variety of ways, such as generating images from text prompts Zhang et al. (2016); Ramesh et al. (2021) or learning useful feature representations Donahue and Simonyan (2019); Chen et al. (2020a). While these models are already capable of producing realistic images and sound, there is still much room for improvement beyond the current state-of-the-art, and better generative models could have wide-ranging impacts on graphic design, games, music production, and countless other fields.
items.zh: 在过去的几年里，生成模型已经能够生成类似人类的自然语言（Brown等人，2020）、无限的高质量合成图像（Brock等人，2018；Karras等人，2019b；Razavi等人，2019）以及高度多样化的人类语音和音乐（van den Oord等人，2016；Dhariwal等人，2020）。这些模型可以以多种方式使用，例如根据文本提示生成图像（Zhang等人，2016；Ramesh等人，2021）或学习有用的特征表示（Donahue和Simonyan，2019；Chen等人，2020a）。虽然这些模型已经能够生成逼真的图像和声音，但超越当前最先进水平仍有很大改进空间，更好的生成模型可能对图形设计、游戏、音乐制作以及无数其他领域产生广泛影响。

items.en: GANs Goodfellow et al. (2014) currently hold the state-of-the-art on most image generation tasks Brock et al. (2018); Wu et al. (2019); Karras et al. (2019b) as measured by sample quality metrics such as FID Heusel et al. (2017), Inception Score Salimans et al. (2016) and Precision Kynkäänniemi et al. (2019). However, some of these metrics do not fully capture diversity, and it has been shown that GANs capture less diversity than state-of-the-art likelihood-based models Razavi et al. (2019); Nichol and Dhariwal (2021); Nash et al. (2021). Furthermore, GANs are often difficult to train, collapsing without carefully selected hyperparameters and regularizers Brock et al. (2018); Miyato et al. (2018); Brock et al. (2016).
items.zh: GAN（Goodfellow等人，2014）目前在大多数图像生成任务中保持最先进水平（Brock等人，2018；Wu等人，2019；Karras等人，2019b），以样本质量指标如FID（Heusel等人，2017）、Inception Score（Salimans等人，2016）和Precision（Kynkäänniemi等人，2019）衡量。然而，其中一些指标并未完全捕捉多样性，并且已有研究表明GAN捕捉的多样性少于最先进的基于似然的模型（Razavi等人，2019；Nichol和Dhariwal，2021；Nash等人，2021）。此外，GAN通常难以训练，如果没有精心选择的超参数和正则化器，就会崩溃（Brock等人，2018；Miyato等人，2018；Brock等人，2016）。

items.en: While GANs hold the state-of-the-art, their drawbacks make them difficult to scale and apply to new domains. As a result, much work has been done to achieve GAN-like sample quality with likelihood-based models Razavi et al. (2019); Ho et al. (2020); Nash et al. (2021); Child (2021). While these models capture more diversity and are typically easier to scale and train than GANs, they still fall short in terms of visual sample quality. Furthermore, except for VAEs, sampling from these models is slower than GANs in terms of wall-clock time.
items.zh: 尽管GAN保持最先进水平，但其缺点使其难以扩展并应用于新领域。因此，许多工作致力于用基于似然的模型实现类似GAN的样本质量（Razavi等人，2019；Ho等人，2020；Nash等人，2021；Child，2021）。虽然这些模型捕捉了更多多样性，并且通常比GAN更容易扩展和训练，但在视觉样本质量方面仍然不足。此外，除VAE外，这些模型的采样在挂钟时间上比GAN慢。

items.en: Diffusion models are a class of likelihood-based models which have recently been shown to produce high-quality images Sohl-Dickstein et al. (2015); Song and Ermon (2020b); Ho et al. (2020) while offering desirable properties such as distribution coverage, a stationary training objective, and easy scalability. These models generate samples by gradually removing noise from a signal, and their training objective can be expressed as a reweighted variational lower-bound Ho et al. (2020). This class of models already holds the state-of-the-art Song et al. (2020b) on CIFAR-10 Krizhevsky et al. (2009), but still lags behind GANs on difficult generation datasets like LSUN and ImageNet. Nichol and Dhariwal [43] found that these models improve reliably with increased compute, and can produce high-quality samples even on the difficult ImageNet 256×\times256 dataset using an upsampling stack. However, the FID of this model is still not competitive with BigGAN-deep Brock et al. (2018), the current state-of-the-art on this dataset.
items.zh: 扩散模型是一类基于似然的模型，最近被证明能够生成高质量图像（Sohl-Dickstein等人，2015；Song和Ermon，2020b；Ho等人，2020），同时具有分布覆盖、稳定的训练目标和易于扩展等理想特性。这些模型通过逐步从信号中去除噪声来生成样本，其训练目标可以表示为重加权的变分下界（Ho等人，2020）。这类模型在CIFAR-10（Krizhevsky等人，2009）上已保持最先进水平（Song等人，2020b），但在LSUN和ImageNet等困难生成数据集上仍落后于GAN。Nichol和Dhariwal [43]发现这些模型随着算力增加而可靠地改进，并且即使在使用上采样堆栈的困难ImageNet 256×256数据集上也能生成高质量样本。然而，该模型的FID仍然无法与BigGAN-deep（Brock等人，2018）竞争，后者是该数据集上的当前最先进模型。

items.en: We hypothesize that the gap between diffusion models and GANs stems from at least two factors: first, that the model architectures used by recent GAN literature have been heavily explored and refined; second, that GANs are able to trade off diversity for fidelity, producing high quality samples but not covering the whole distribution. We aim to bring these benefits to diffusion models, first by improving model architecture and then by devising a scheme for trading off diversity for fidelity. With these improvements, we achieve a new state-of-the-art, surpassing GANs on several different metrics and datasets.
items.zh: 我们假设扩散模型与GAN之间的差距至少源于两个因素：首先，近期GAN文献中使用的模型架构已被大量探索和优化；其次，GAN能够在多样性和保真度之间进行权衡，生成高质量样本但不覆盖整个分布。我们旨在将这些优势引入扩散模型，首先通过改进模型架构，然后设计一种在多样性和保真度之间权衡的方案。通过这些改进，我们实现了新的最先进水平，在多个不同指标和数据集上超越了GAN。

items.en: The rest of the paper is organized as follows. In Section 2, we give a brief background of diffusion models based on Ho et al. [25] and the improvements from Nichol and Dhariwal [43] and Song et al. [57], and we describe our evaluation setup. In Section 3, we introduce simple architecture improvements that give a substantial boost to FID. In Section 4, we describe a method for using gradients from a classifier to guide a diffusion model during sampling. We find that a single hyperparameter, the scale of the classifier gradients, can be tuned to trade off diversity for fidelity, and we can increase this gradient scale factor by an order of magnitude without obtaining adversarial examples Szegedy et al. (2013). Finally, in Section 5 we show that models with our improved architecture achieve state-of-the-art on unconditional image synthesis tasks, and with classifier guidance achieve state-of-the-art on conditional image synthesis. When using classifier guidance, we find that we can sample with as few as 25 forward passes while maintaining FIDs comparable to BigGAN. We also compare our improved models to upsampling stacks, finding that the two approaches give complementary improvements and that combining them gives the best results on ImageNet 256×\times256 and 512×\times512.
items.zh: 本文的其余部分组织如下。在第2节中，我们基于Ho等人[25]以及Nichol和Dhariwal [43]和Song等人[57]的改进，简要介绍扩散模型的背景，并描述我们的评估设置。在第3节中，我们介绍简单的架构改进，这些改进显著提升了FID。在第4节中，我们描述了一种在采样过程中利用分类器梯度引导扩散模型的方法。我们发现，单个超参数——分类器梯度的尺度——可以调整以在多样性和保真度之间进行权衡，并且我们可以将该梯度尺度因子提高一个数量级而不会产生对抗样本（Szegedy等人，2013）。最后，在第5节中，我们展示了具有改进架构的模型在无条件图像合成任务上达到了最先进水平，并且通过分类器引导在条件图像合成上达到了最先进水平。当使用分类器引导时，我们发现只需25次前向传播即可采样，同时保持与BigGAN相当的FID。我们还将改进后的模型与上采样堆栈进行比较，发现这两种方法提供了互补的改进，并且将它们结合在ImageNet 256×256和512×512上取得了最佳结果。

items.en: In this section, we provide a brief overview of diffusion models. For a more detailed mathematical description, we refer the reader to Appendix B.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们简要概述扩散模型。如需更详细的数学描述，请参考附录B。

items.en: On a high level, diffusion models sample from a distribution by reversing a gradual noising process. In particular, sampling starts with noise xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} and produces gradually less-noisy samples xT−1,xT−2,…subscript𝑥𝑇1subscript𝑥𝑇2…x_{T-1},x_{T-2},... until reaching a final sample x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}. Each timestep t𝑡t corresponds to a certain noise level, and xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} can be thought of as a mixture of a signal x0subscript𝑥0x_{0} with some noise ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon where the signal to noise ratio is determined by the timestep t𝑡t. For the remainder of this paper, we assume that the noise ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is drawn from a diagonal Gaussian distribution, which works well for natural images and simplifies various derivations.
items.zh: 在高层次上，扩散模型通过逆转逐渐加噪的过程从分布中采样。具体来说，采样从噪声x_T开始，并逐步产生噪声较小的样本x_{T-1}, x_{T-2}, ...，直到达到最终样本x_0。每个时间步t对应一定的噪声水平，x_t可以看作是信号x_0与噪声ϵ的混合，其中信噪比由时间步t决定。在本文的其余部分，我们假设噪声ϵ来自对角高斯分布，这对自然图像效果良好并简化了各种推导。

items.en: A diffusion model learns to produce a slightly more “denoised” xt−1subscript𝑥𝑡1x_{t-1} from xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. Ho et al. [25] parameterize this model as a function ϵθ​(xt,t)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t) which predicts the noise component of a noisy sample xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}. To train these models, each sample in a minibatch is produced by randomly drawing a data sample x0subscript𝑥0x_{0}, a timestep t𝑡t, and noise ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, which together give rise to a noised sample xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} (Equation 17). The training objective is then ‖ϵθ​(xt,t)−ϵ‖2superscriptnormsubscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡italic-ϵ2||\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t)-\epsilon||^{2}, i.e. a simple mean-squared error loss between the true noise and the predicted noise (Equation 26).
items.zh: 扩散模型学习从x_t生成稍微“去噪”的x_{t-1}。Ho等人[25]将该模型参数化为函数ϵ_θ(x_t, t)，该函数预测噪声样本x_t的噪声分量。为了训练这些模型，小批量中的每个样本通过随机抽取数据样本x_0、时间步t和噪声ϵ生成，这些共同产生噪声样本x_t（公式17）。训练目标为||ϵ_θ(x_t, t) - ϵ||^2，即真实噪声与预测噪声之间的简单均方误差损失（公式26）。

items.en: It is not immediately obvious how to sample from a noise predictor ϵθ​(xt,t)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t). Recall that diffusion sampling proceeds by repeatedly predicting xt−1subscript𝑥𝑡1x_{t-1} from xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}, starting from xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T}. Ho et al. [25] show that, under reasonable assumptions, we can model the distribution pθ​(xt−1|xt)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡p_{\theta}(x_{t-1}|x_{t}) of xt−1subscript𝑥𝑡1x_{t-1} given xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} as a diagonal Gaussian 𝒩​(xt−1;μθ​(xt,t),Σθ​(xt,t))𝒩subscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝜇𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡subscriptΣ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\mathcal{N}(x_{t-1};\mu_{\theta}(x_{t},t),\Sigma_{\theta}(x_{t},t)), where the mean μθ​(xt,t)subscript𝜇𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\mu_{\theta}(x_{t},t) can be calculated as a function of ϵθ​(xt,t)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t) (Equation 27). The variance Σθ​(xt,t)subscriptΣ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\Sigma_{\theta}(x_{t},t) of this Gaussian distribution can be fixed to a known constant Ho et al. (2020) or learned with a separate neural network head Nichol and Dhariwal (2021), and both approaches yield high-quality samples when the total number of diffusion steps T𝑇T is large enough.
items.zh: 如何从噪声预测器ϵ_θ(x_t, t)进行采样并不显而易见。回想一下，扩散采样通过从x_T开始，反复从x_t预测x_{t-1}进行。Ho等人[25]表明，在合理假设下，我们可以将给定x_t时x_{t-1}的分布p_θ(x_{t-1}|x_t)建模为对角高斯分布N(x_{t-1}; μ_θ(x_t, t), Σ_θ(x_t, t))，其中均值μ_θ(x_t, t)可以计算为ϵ_θ(x_t, t)的函数（公式27）。该高斯分布的方差Σ_θ(x_t, t)可以固定为已知常数（Ho等人，2020）或用单独的神经网络头学习（Nichol和Dhariwal，2021），当扩散步骤总数T足够大时，两种方法都能产生高质量样本。

items.en: Ho et al. [25] observe that the simple mean-sqaured error objective, Lsimplesubscript𝐿simpleL_{\text{simple}}, works better in practice than the actual variational lower bound Lvlbsubscript𝐿vlbL_{\text{vlb}} that can be derived from interpreting the denoising diffusion model as a VAE. They also note that training with this objective and using their corresponding sampling procedure is equivalent to the denoising score matching model from Song and Ermon [58], who use Langevin dynamics to sample from a denoising model trained with multiple noise levels to produce high quality image samples. We often use “diffusion models” as shorthand to refer to both classes of models.
items.zh: Ho等人[25]观察到，简单的均方误差目标L_simple在实践中比从将去噪扩散模型解释为VAE推导出的实际变分下界L_vlb效果更好。他们还注意到，使用该目标及其相应的采样过程进行训练，等价于Song和Ermon [58]的去噪分数匹配模型，后者使用Langevin动力学从使用多个噪声水平训练的去噪模型中采样，以产生高质量图像样本。我们通常使用“扩散模型”作为这两类模型的简称。

items.en: Following the breakthrough work of Song and Ermon [58] and Ho et al. [25], several recent papers have proposed improvements to diffusion models. Here we describe a few of these improvements, which we employ for our models.
items.zh: 继Song和Ermon [58]以及Ho等人[25]的突破性工作之后，最近有几篇论文提出了扩散模型的改进。这里我们描述其中一些改进，我们在模型中使用它们。

items.en: Nichol and Dhariwal [43] find that fixing the variance Σθ​(xt,t)subscriptΣ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\Sigma_{\theta}(x_{t},t) to a constant as done in Ho et al. [25] is sub-optimal for sampling with fewer diffusion steps, and propose to parameterize Σθ​(xt,t)subscriptΣ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\Sigma_{\theta}(x_{t},t) as a neural network whose output v𝑣v is interpolated as:

items.en: Here, βtsubscript𝛽𝑡\beta_{t} and β~tsubscript~𝛽𝑡\tilde{\beta}_{t} (Equation 19) are the variances in Ho et al. [25] corresponding to upper and lower bounds for the reverse process variances. Additionally, Nichol and Dhariwal [43] propose a hybrid objective for training both ϵθ​(xt,t)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t) and Σθ​(xt,t)subscriptΣ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\Sigma_{\theta}(x_{t},t) using the weighted sum Lsimple+λ​Lvlbsubscript𝐿simple𝜆subscript𝐿vlbL_{\text{simple}}+\lambda L_{\text{vlb}}. Learning the reverse process variances with their hybrid objective allows sampling with fewer steps without much drop in sample quality. We adopt this objective and parameterization, and use it throughout our experiments.
items.zh: 这里，β_t和β̃_t（公式19）是Ho等人[25]中的方差，对应于反向过程方差的上界和下界。此外，Nichol和Dhariwal [43]提出了一种混合目标，用于同时训练ϵ_θ(x_t, t)和Σ_θ(x_t, t)，使用加权和L_simple + λ L_vlb。使用他们的混合目标学习反向过程方差，可以在采样步骤较少的情况下进行采样，而样本质量不会大幅下降。我们采用该目标和参数化，并在所有实验中使用。

items.en: Song et al. [57] propose DDIM, which formulates an alternative non-Markovian noising process that has the same forward marginals as DDPM, but allows producing different reverse samplers by changing the variance of the reverse noise. By setting this noise to 0, they provide a way to turn any model ϵθ​(xt,t)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t) into a deterministic mapping from latents to images, and find that this provides an alternative way to sample with fewer steps. We adopt this sampling approach when using fewer than 50 sampling steps, since Nichol and Dhariwal [43] found it to be beneficial in this regime.
items.zh: Song等人[57]提出了DDIM，它制定了一种替代的非马尔可夫加噪过程，具有与DDPM相同的前向边缘分布，但允许通过改变反向噪声的方差来产生不同的反向采样器。通过将该噪声设置为0，他们提供了一种将任何模型ϵ_θ(x_t, t)转换为从潜变量到图像的确定性映射的方法，并发现这提供了另一种使用较少步骤进行采样的方法。当采样步骤少于50时，我们采用这种采样方法，因为Nichol和Dhariwal [43]发现它在此范围内是有益的。

items.en: For comparing sample quality across models, we perform quantitative evaluations using the following metrics. While these metrics are often used in practice and correspond well with human judgement, they are not a perfect proxy, and finding better metrics for sample quality evaluation is still an open problem.
items.zh: 为了比较不同模型的样本质量，我们使用以下指标进行定量评估。虽然这些指标在实践中经常使用并且与人类判断相符，但它们并非完美的代理，寻找更好的样本质量评估指标仍然是一个开放问题。

items.en: Inception Score (IS) was proposed by Salimans et al. [54], and it measures how well a model captures the full ImageNet class distribution while still producing individual samples that are convincing examples of a single class. One drawback of this metric is that it does not reward covering the whole distribution or capturing diversity within a class, and models which memorize a small subset of the full dataset will still have high IS Barratt and Sharma (2018). To better capture diversity than IS, Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) was proposed by Heusel et al. [23], who argued that it is more consistent with human judgement than Inception Score. FID provides a symmetric measure of the distance between two image distributions in the Inception-V3 Szegedy et al. (2015) latent space. Recently, sFID was proposed by Nash et al. [42] as a version of FID that uses spatial features rather than the standard pooled features. They find that this metric better captures spatial relationships, rewarding image distributions with coherent high-level structure. Finally, Kynkäänniemi et al. [32] proposed Improved Precision and Recall metrics to separately measure sample fidelity as the fraction of model samples which fall into the data manifold (precision), and diversity as the fraction of data samples which fall into the sample manifold (recall).
items.zh: Inception Score (IS)由Salimans等人[54]提出，它衡量模型在捕捉完整ImageNet类别分布的同时，生成单个样本作为单个类别的令人信服例子的程度。该指标的一个缺点是它不奖励覆盖整个分布或捕捉类别内的多样性，并且记忆完整数据集小部分的模型仍然具有高IS（Barratt和Sharma，2018）。为了更好地捕捉多样性，Heusel等人[23]提出了Fréchet Inception Distance (FID)，他们认为FID比Inception Score更符合人类判断。FID提供了Inception-V3（Szegedy等人，2015）潜在空间中两个图像分布之间距离的对称度量。最近，Nash等人[42]提出了sFID，作为使用空间特征而非标准池化特征的FID版本。他们发现该指标更好地捕捉空间关系，奖励具有连贯高层结构的图像分布。最后，Kynkäänniemi等人[32]提出了改进的Precision和Recall指标，分别衡量样本保真度（模型样本落入数据流形的比例，即Precision）和多样性（数据样本落入样本流形的比例，即Recall）。

items.en: We use FID as our default metric for overall sample quality comparisons as it captures both diversity and fidelity and has been the de facto standard metric for state-of-the-art generative modeling work Karras et al. (2019a, b); Brock et al. (2018); Ho et al. (2020). We use Precision or IS to measure fidelity, and Recall to measure diversity or distribution coverage. When comparing against other methods, we re-compute these metrics using public samples or models whenever possible. This is for two reasons: first, some papers Karras et al. (2019a, b); Ho et al. (2020) compare against arbitrary subsets of the training set which are not readily available; and second, subtle implementation differences can affect the resulting FID values Parmar et al. (2021). To ensure consistent comparisons, we use the entire training set as the reference batch Heusel et al. (2017); Brock et al. (2018), and evaluate metrics for all models using the same codebase.
items.zh: 我们使用FID作为整体样本质量比较的默认指标，因为它同时捕捉多样性和保真度，并且已成为最先进生成建模工作的事实标准指标（Karras等人，2019a, b；Brock等人，2018；Ho等人，2020）。我们使用Precision或IS衡量保真度，使用Recall衡量多样性或分布覆盖。在与其他方法比较时，我们尽可能使用公开样本或模型重新计算这些指标。原因有二：首先，一些论文（Karras等人，2019a, b；Ho等人，2020）与训练集的任意子集进行比较，这些子集不易获得；其次，微妙的实现差异会影响最终的FID值（Parmar等人，2021）。为确保一致比较，我们使用整个训练集作为参考批次（Heusel等人，2017；Brock等人，2018），并使用相同的代码库评估所有模型的指标。

items.en: In this section we conduct several architecture ablations to find the model architecture that provides the best sample quality for diffusion models.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们进行了多项架构消融实验，以寻找能为扩散模型提供最佳样本质量的模型架构。

items.en: Ho et al. [25] introduced the UNet architecture for diffusion models, which Jolicoeur-Martineau et al. [26] found to substantially improve sample quality over the previous architectures Song and Ermon (2020a); Lin et al. (2016) used for denoising score matching. The UNet model uses a stack of residual layers and downsampling convolutions, followed by a stack of residual layers with upsampling colvolutions, with skip connections connecting the layers with the same spatial size. In addition, they use a global attention layer at the 16×\times16 resolution with a single head, and add a projection of the timestep embedding into each residual block. Song et al. [60] found that further changes to the UNet architecture improved performance on the CIFAR-10 Krizhevsky et al. (2009) and CelebA-64 Liu et al. (2015) datasets. We show the same result on ImageNet 128×\times128, finding that architecture can indeed give a substantial boost to sample quality on much larger and more diverse datasets at a higher resolution.
items.zh: Ho等人[25]引入了用于扩散模型的UNet架构，Jolicoeur-Martineau等人[26]发现该架构相比Song和Ermon（2020a）以及Lin等人（2016）用于去噪分数匹配的先前架构，显著提升了样本质量。UNet模型使用一组残差层和下采样卷积，随后是一组带有上采样卷积的残差层，并通过跳跃连接连接具有相同空间大小的层。此外，他们在16×16分辨率下使用单头全局注意力层，并将时间步嵌入投影到每个残差块中。Song等人[60]发现，对UNet架构的进一步更改提高了在CIFAR-10 Krizhevsky等人（2009）和CelebA-64 Liu等人（2015）数据集上的性能。我们在ImageNet 128×128上展示了相同的结果，发现架构确实可以在更高分辨率下为更大、更多样化的数据集带来显著的样本质量提升。

items.en: We explore the following architectural changes:
items.zh: 我们探索了以下架构更改：

items.en: Increasing depth versus width, holding model size relatively constant.
items.zh: 在保持模型大小相对恒定的情况下，增加深度与宽度。

items.en: Increasing the number of attention heads.
items.zh: 增加注意力头的数量。

items.en: Using attention at 32×\times32, 16×\times16, and 8×\times8 resolutions rather than only at 16×\times16.
items.zh: 在32×32、16×16和8×8分辨率下使用注意力，而不仅仅在16×16分辨率下。

items.en: Using the BigGAN Brock et al. (2018) residual block for upsampling and downsampling the activations, following Song et al. (2020b).
items.zh: 使用BigGAN Brock等人（2018）的残差块进行上采样和下采样激活，遵循Song等人（2020b）的方法。

items.en: Rescaling residual connections with 1212\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}, following Song et al. (2020b); Karras et al. (2019a, b).
items.zh: 使用1/√2重新缩放残差连接，遵循Song等人（2020b）；Karras等人（2019a, b）的方法。

items.en: For all comparisons in this section, we train models on ImageNet 128×\times128 with batch size 256, and sample using 250 sampling steps. We train models with the above architecture changes and compare them on FID, evaluated at two different points of training, in Table 1. Aside from rescaling residual connections, all of the other modifications improve performance and have a positive compounding effect. We observe in Figure 2 that while increased depth helps performance, it increases training time and takes longer to reach the same performance as a wider model, so we opt not to use this change in further experiments.
items.zh: 在本节的所有比较中，我们在ImageNet 128×128上训练模型，批量大小为256，并使用250个采样步骤进行采样。我们训练了具有上述架构更改的模型，并在表1中比较了它们在训练的两个不同时间点的FID。除了重新缩放残差连接外，所有其他修改都提高了性能，并具有正向的复合效应。我们在图2中观察到，虽然增加深度有助于性能，但它增加了训练时间，并且需要更长的时间才能达到与更宽模型相同的性能，因此我们在后续实验中不采用这一更改。

items.en: We also study other attention configurations that better match the Transformer architecture Vaswani et al. (2017). To this end, we experimented with either fixing attention heads to a constant, or fixing the number of channels per head. For the rest of the architecture, we use 128 base channels, 2 residual blocks per resolution, multi-resolution attention, and BigGAN up/downsampling, and we train the models for 700K iterations. Table 2 shows our results, indicating that more heads or fewer channels per head improves FID. In Figure 2, we see 64 channels is best for wall-clock time, so we opt to use 64 channels per head as our default. We note that this choice also better matches modern transformer architectures, and is on par with our other configurations in terms of final FID.
items.zh: 我们还研究了其他更符合Transformer架构Vaswani等人（2017）的注意力配置。为此，我们尝试了将注意力头固定为常数，或将每个头的通道数固定。对于其余架构，我们使用128个基础通道、每个分辨率2个残差块、多分辨率注意力和BigGAN上/下采样，并训练模型700K次迭代。表2显示了我们的结果，表明更多的头或更少的每头通道数改善了FID。在图2中，我们看到64个通道在挂钟时间上最佳，因此我们选择默认使用每头64个通道。我们注意到，这一选择也更符合现代Transformer架构，并且在最终FID方面与其他配置相当。

items.en: We also experiment with a layer Nichol and Dhariwal (2021) that we refer to as adaptive group normalization (AdaGN), which incorporates the timestep and class embedding into each residual block after a group normalization operation Wu and He (2018), similar to adaptive instance norm Karras et al. (2019a) and FiLM Perez et al. (2017). We define this layer as AdaGN​(h,y)=ys​ GroupNorm​(h)+ybAdaGNℎ𝑦subscript𝑦𝑠 GroupNormℎsubscript𝑦𝑏\text{AdaGN}(h,y)=y_{s}\text{ GroupNorm}(h)+y_{b}, where hℎh is the intermediate activations of the residual block following the first convolution, and y=[ys,yb]𝑦subscript𝑦𝑠subscript𝑦𝑏y=[y_{s},y_{b}] is obtained from a linear projection of the timestep and class embedding.
items.zh: 我们还实验了一种层Nichol和Dhariwal（2021），我们称之为自适应组归一化（AdaGN），它在组归一化操作Wu和He（2018）之后将时间步和类嵌入整合到每个残差块中，类似于自适应实例归一化Karras等人（2019a）和FiLM Perez等人（2017）。我们将该层定义为AdaGN(h,y)=y_s GroupNorm(h)+y_b，其中h是残差块中第一次卷积后的中间激活，y=[y_s,y_b]是从时间步和类嵌入的线性投影中获得的。

items.en: We had already seen AdaGN improve our earliest diffusion models, and so had it included by default in all our runs. In Table 3, we explicitly ablate this choice, and find that the adaptive group normalization layer indeed improved FID. Both models use 128 base channels and 2 residual blocks per resolution, multi-resolution attention with 64 channels per head, and BigGAN up/downsampling, and were trained for 700K iterations.
items.zh: 我们之前已经看到AdaGN改进了我们早期的扩散模型，因此默认将其包含在所有运行中。在表3中，我们明确消融了这一选择，发现自适应组归一化层确实改善了FID。两个模型都使用128个基础通道和每个分辨率2个残差块、每头64个通道的多分辨率注意力以及BigGAN上/下采样，并训练了700K次迭代。

items.en: In the rest of the paper, we use this final improved model architecture as our default: variable width with 2 residual blocks per resolution, multiple heads with 64 channels per head, attention at 32, 16 and 8 resolutions, BigGAN residual blocks for up and downsampling, and adaptive group normalization for injecting timestep and class embeddings into residual blocks.
items.zh: 在本文的其余部分，我们使用这个最终改进的模型架构作为默认：可变宽度，每个分辨率2个残差块，多个头，每头64个通道，在32、16和8分辨率下的注意力，用于上采样和下采样的BigGAN残差块，以及用于将时间步和类嵌入注入残差块的自适应组归一化。

items.en: In addition to employing well designed architectures, GANs for conditional image synthesis Mirza and Osindero (2014); Brock et al. (2018) make heavy use of class labels. This often takes the form of class-conditional normalization statistics Dumoulin et al. (2017); de Vries et al. (2017) as well as discriminators with heads that are explicitly designed to behave like classifiers p​(y|x)𝑝conditional𝑦𝑥p(y|x) Miyato and Koyama (2018). As further evidence that class information is crucial to the success of these models, Lucic et al. [36] find that it is helpful to generate synthetic labels when working in a label-limited regime.
items.zh: 除了采用精心设计的架构外，用于条件图像合成的GAN Mirza和Osindero（2014）；Brock等人（2018）大量使用类标签。这通常采取类条件归一化统计量Dumoulin等人（2017）；de Vries等人（2017）以及具有明确设计为类似分类器p(y|x) Miyato和Koyama（2018）行为的判别器头的形式。作为类信息对这些模型成功至关重要的进一步证据，Lucic等人[36]发现在标签有限的情况下生成合成标签是有帮助的。

items.en: Given this observation for GANs, it makes sense to explore different ways to condition diffusion models on class labels. We already incorporate class information into normalization layers (Section 3.1). Here, we explore a different approach: exploiting a classifier p​(y|x)𝑝conditional𝑦𝑥p(y|x) to improve a diffusion generator. Sohl-Dickstein et al. [56] and Song et al. [60] show one way to achieve this, wherein a pre-trained diffusion model can be conditioned using the gradients of a classifier. In particular, we can train a classifier pϕ​(y|xt,t)subscript𝑝italic-ϕconditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡p_{\phi}(y|x_{t},t) on noisy images xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}, and then use gradients ∇xtlog⁡pϕ​(y|xt,t)subscript∇subscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑝italic-ϕconditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡\mathop{}\!\nabla_{\!x_{t}}\log p_{\phi}(y|x_{t},t) to guide the diffusion sampling process towards an arbitrary class label y𝑦y.
items.zh: 鉴于GAN的这一观察结果，探索不同的方式来条件化扩散模型于类标签是有意义的。我们已经将类信息纳入归一化层（第3.1节）。在这里，我们探索一种不同的方法：利用分类器p(y|x)来改进扩散生成器。Sohl-Dickstein等人[56]和Song等人[60]展示了一种实现方法，其中预训练的扩散模型可以使用分类器的梯度进行条件化。特别地，我们可以在噪声图像x_t上训练分类器p_φ(y|x_t,t)，然后使用梯度∇_{x_t} log p_φ(y|x_t,t)来引导扩散采样过程朝向任意类标签y。

items.en: In this section, we first review two ways of deriving conditional sampling processes using classifiers. We then describe how we use such classifiers in practice to improve sample quality. We choose the notation pϕ​(y|xt,t)=pϕ​(y|xt)subscript𝑝italic-ϕconditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡subscript𝑝italic-ϕconditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡p_{\phi}(y|x_{t},t)=p_{\phi}(y|x_{t}) and ϵθ​(xt,t)=ϵθ​(xt)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡𝑡subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t},t)=\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t}) for brevity, noting that they refer to separate functions for each timestep t𝑡t and at training time the models must be conditioned on the input t𝑡t.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先回顾使用分类器推导条件采样过程的两种方法。然后，我们描述如何在实践中使用这些分类器来提高样本质量。我们选择符号p_φ(y|x_t,t)=p_φ(y|x_t)和ε_θ(x_t,t)=ε_θ(x_t)以简洁起见，注意到它们指的是每个时间步t的单独函数，并且在训练时模型必须基于输入t进行条件化。

items.en: We start with a diffusion model with an unconditional reverse noising process pθ​(xt|xt+1)subscript𝑝𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑥𝑡1p_{\theta}(x_{t}|x_{t+1}). To condition this on a label y𝑦y, it suffices to sample each transition111We must also sample xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} conditioned on y𝑦y, but a noisy enough diffusion process causes xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} to be nearly Gaussian even in the conditional case. according to

items.en: where Z𝑍Z is a normalizing constant (proof in Appendix H). It is typically intractable to sample from this distribution exactly, but Sohl-Dickstein et al. [56] show that it can be approximated as a perturbed Gaussian distribution. Here, we review this derivation.
items.zh: 其中Z是归一化常数（证明见附录H）。通常难以精确地从该分布中采样，但Sohl-Dickstein等人[56]表明它可以近似为扰动高斯分布。这里，我们回顾这一推导。

items.zh: 回顾一下，我们的扩散模型使用高斯分布从时间步 xt+1 预测前一个时间步 xt：

This assumption is reasonable in the limit of infinite diffusion steps, where ‖Σ‖→0→normΣ0||\Sigma||\to 0. In this case, we can approximate log⁡pϕ​(y|xt)subscript𝑝italic-ϕconditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡\log p_{\phi}(y|x_{t}) using a Taylor expansion around xt=μsubscript𝑥𝑡𝜇x_{t}=\mu as

items.en: We can safely ignore the constant term C4subscript𝐶4C_{4}, since it corresponds to the normalizing coefficient Z𝑍Z in Equation 2. We have thus found that the conditional transition operator can be approximated by a Gaussian similar to the unconditional transition operator, but with its mean shifted by Σ​gΣ𝑔\Sigma g. Algorithm 1 summaries the corresponding sampling algorithm. We include an optional scale factor s𝑠s for the gradients, which we describe in more detail in Section 4.3.
items.zh: 我们可以安全地忽略常数项 C4，因为它对应于方程 2 中的归一化系数 Z。因此，我们发现条件转移算子可以近似为与无条件转移算子类似的高斯分布，但其均值偏移了 Σg。算法 1 总结了相应的采样算法。我们为梯度包含了一个可选的缩放因子 s，这将在第 4.3 节中详细描述。

items.en: The above derivation for conditional sampling is only valid for the stochastic diffusion sampling process, and cannot be applied to deterministic sampling methods like DDIM Song et al. (2020a). To this end, we use a score-based conditioning trick adapted from Song et al. [60], which leverages the connection between diffusion models and score matching Song and Ermon (2020b). In particular, if we have a model ϵθ​(xt)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t}) that predicts the noise added to a sample, then this can be used to derive a score function:
items.zh: 上述条件采样的推导仅适用于随机扩散采样过程，不能应用于确定性采样方法，如 DDIM (Song et al., 2020a)。为此，我们使用了一种基于分数的条件技巧，改编自 Song 等人 [60]，该技巧利用了扩散模型与分数匹配之间的联系 (Song and Ermon, 2020b)。特别地，如果我们有一个模型 ϵ_θ(xt) 可以预测添加到样本中的噪声，那么这可以用来推导出一个分数函数：

items.en: We can now substitute this into the score function for p​(xt)​p​(y|xt)𝑝subscript𝑥𝑡𝑝conditional𝑦subscript𝑥𝑡p(x_{t})p(y|x_{t}):
items.zh: 现在我们可以将其代入 p(xt)p(y|xt) 的分数函数中：

items.en: Finally, we can define a new epsilon prediction ϵ^​(xt)^italic-ϵsubscript𝑥𝑡\hat{\epsilon}(x_{t}) which corresponds to the score of the joint distribution:
items.zh: 最后，我们可以定义一个新的 epsilon 预测 ϵ̂(xt)，它对应于联合分布的分数：

items.en: We can then use the exact same sampling procedure as used for regular DDIM, but with the modified noise predictions ϵ^θ​(xt)subscript^italic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡\hat{\epsilon}_{\theta}(x_{t}) instead of ϵθ​(xt)subscriptitalic-ϵ𝜃subscript𝑥𝑡\epsilon_{\theta}(x_{t}). Algorithm 2 summaries the corresponding sampling algorithm.
items.zh: 然后，我们可以使用与常规 DDIM 完全相同的采样过程，但使用修改后的噪声预测 ϵ̂_θ(xt) 代替 ϵ_θ(xt)。算法 2 总结了相应的采样算法。

items.en: To apply classifier guidance to a large scale generative task, we train classification models on ImageNet. Our classifier architecture is simply the downsampling trunk of the UNet model with an attention pool Radford et al. (2021) at the 8x8 layer to produce the final output. We train these classifiers on the same noising distribution as the corresponding diffusion model, and also add random crops to reduce overfitting. After training, we incorporate the classifier into the sampling process of the diffusion model using Equation 10, as outlined by Algorithm 1.
items.zh: 为了将分类器引导应用于大规模生成任务，我们在 ImageNet 上训练分类模型。我们的分类器架构只是 UNet 模型的下采样主干，并在 8x8 层使用注意力池化 (Radford et al., 2021) 来产生最终输出。我们在与相应扩散模型相同的噪声分布上训练这些分类器，并添加随机裁剪以减少过拟合。训练后，我们使用方程 10 将分类器纳入扩散模型的采样过程，如算法 1 所述。

items.en: In initial experiments with unconditional ImageNet models, we found it necessary to scale the classifier gradients by a constant factor larger than 1. When using a scale of 1, we observed that the classifier assigned reasonable probabilities (around 50%) to the desired classes for the final samples, but these samples did not match the intended classes upon visual inspection. Scaling up the classifier gradients remedied this problem, and the class probabilities from the classifier increased to nearly 100%. Figure 3 shows an example of this effect.
items.zh: 在使用无条件 ImageNet 模型的初步实验中，我们发现有必要将分类器梯度缩放一个大于 1 的常数因子。当使用缩放因子 1 时，我们观察到分类器为最终样本分配了合理的概率（约 50%）给期望类别，但这些样本在视觉检查时与预期类别不匹配。放大分类器梯度解决了这个问题，分类器的类别概率增加到接近 100%。图 3 展示了这一效果的一个示例。

items.en: To understand the effect of scaling classifier gradients, note that s⋅∇xlog⁡p​(y|x)=∇xlog⁡1Z​p​(y|x)s⋅𝑠subscript∇𝑥𝑝conditional𝑦𝑥subscript∇𝑥1𝑍𝑝superscriptconditional𝑦𝑥𝑠s\cdot\mathop{}\!\nabla_{\!x}\log p(y|x)=\mathop{}\!\nabla_{\!x}\log\frac{1}{Z}p(y|x)^{s}, where Z𝑍Z is an arbitrary constant. As a result, the conditioning process is still theoretically grounded in a re-normalized classifier distribution proportional to p​(y|x)s𝑝superscriptconditional𝑦𝑥𝑠p(y|x)^{s}. When s>1𝑠1s>1, this distribution becomes sharper than p​(y|x)𝑝conditional𝑦𝑥p(y|x), since larger values are amplified by the exponent. In other words, using a larger gradient scale focuses more on the modes of the classifier, which is potentially desirable for producing higher fidelity (but less diverse) samples.
items.zh: 为了理解缩放分类器梯度的效果，注意 s·∇_x log p(y|x) = ∇_x log (1/Z) p(y|x)^s，其中 Z 是任意常数。因此，条件处理过程在理论上仍然基于重新归一化的分类器分布，该分布与 p(y|x)^s 成比例。当 s>1 时，该分布比 p(y|x) 更尖锐，因为较大的值被指数放大。换句话说，使用更大的梯度尺度更关注分类器的模式，这对于产生更高保真度（但多样性较低）的样本可能是可取的。

items.en: In the above derivations, we assumed that the underlying diffusion model was unconditional, modeling p​(x)𝑝𝑥p(x). It is also possible to train conditional diffusion models, p​(x|y)𝑝conditional𝑥𝑦p(x|y), and use classifier guidance in the exact same way. Table 4 shows that the sample quality of both unconditional and conditional models can be greatly improved by classifier guidance. We see that, with a high enough scale, the guided unconditional model can get quite close to the FID of an unguided conditional model, although training directly with the class labels still helps. Guiding a conditional model further improves FID.
items.zh: 在上述推导中，我们假设底层扩散模型是无条件的，建模 p(x)。也可以训练条件扩散模型 p(x|y)，并以完全相同的方式使用分类器引导。表 4 显示，通过分类器引导，无条件模型和条件模型的样本质量都可以大大提高。我们看到，在足够高的缩放因子下，引导的无条件模型可以非常接近未引导的条件模型的 FID，尽管直接使用类别标签进行训练仍然有帮助。引导条件模型进一步改善了 FID。

items.en: To evaluate our improved model architecture on unconditional image generation, we train separate diffusion models on three LSUN Yu et al. (2015) classes: bedroom, horse, and cat. To evaluate classifier guidance, we train conditional diffusion models on the ImageNet Russakovsky et al. (2014) dataset at 128×\times128, 256×\times256, and 512×\times512 resolution.
items.zh: 为了评估我们改进的模型架构在无条件图像生成上的表现，我们在 LSUN (Yu et al., 2015) 的三个类别（卧室、马和猫）上分别训练扩散模型。为了评估分类器引导，我们在 ImageNet (Russakovsky et al., 2014) 数据集上训练条件扩散模型，分辨率分别为 128×128、256×256 和 512×512。

items.en: We also compare guidance to using a two-stage upsampling stack. Nichol and Dhariwal [43] and Saharia et al. [53] train two-stage diffusion models by combining a low-resolution diffusion model with a corresponding upsampling diffusion model. In this approach, the upsampling model is trained to upsample images from the training set, and conditions on low-resolution images that are concatenated channel-wise to the model input using a simple interpolation (e.g. bilinear). During sampling, the low-resolution model produces a sample, and then the upsampling model is conditioned on this sample. This greatly improves FID on ImageNet 256×\times256, but does not reach the same performance as state-of-the-art models like BigGAN-deep Nichol and Dhariwal (2021); Saharia et al. (2021), as seen in Table 5.
items.zh: 我们还比较了引导与使用两阶段上采样堆叠的效果。Nichol和Dhariwal [43]以及Saharia等人 [53]通过将低分辨率扩散模型与相应的上采样扩散模型相结合，训练了两阶段扩散模型。在这种方法中，上采样模型被训练用于对训练集中的图像进行上采样，并通过简单的插值（例如双线性）将低分辨率图像按通道维度连接到模型输入作为条件。在采样过程中，低分辨率模型生成一个样本，然后上采样模型以该样本为条件。这大大改善了ImageNet 256×256上的FID，但如表5所示，并未达到BigGAN-deep等最先进模型的性能。

items.en: In Table 6, we show that guidance and upsampling improve sample quality along different axes. While upsampling improves precision while keeping a high recall, guidance provides a knob to trade off diversity for much higher precision. We achieve the best FIDs by using guidance at a lower resolution before upsampling to a higher resolution, indicating that these approaches complement one another.
items.zh: 在表6中，我们展示了引导和上采样在不同维度上提高了样本质量。上采样在保持高召回率的同时提高了精确度，而引导则提供了一个权衡多样性以获得更高精确度的旋钮。通过在较低分辨率下使用引导，然后上采样到更高分辨率，我们实现了最佳FID，这表明这些方法相互补充。

items.en: Score based generative models were introduced by Song and Ermon [59] as a way of modeling a data distribution using its gradients, and then sampling using Langevin dynamics Welling and Teh (2011). Ho et al. [25] found a connection between this method and diffusion models Sohl-Dickstein et al. (2015), and achieved excellent sample quality by leveraging this connection. After this breakthrough work, many works followed up with more promising results: Kong et al. [30] and Chen et al. [8] demonstrated that diffusion models work well for audio; Jolicoeur-Martineau et al. [26] found that a GAN-like setup could improve samples from these models; Song et al. [60] explored ways to leverage techniques from stochastic differential equations to improve the sample quality obtained by score-based models; Song et al. [57] and Nichol and Dhariwal [43] proposed methods to improve sampling speed; Nichol and Dhariwal [43] and Saharia et al. [53] demonstrated promising results on the difficult ImageNet generation task using upsampling diffusion models. Also related to diffusion models, and following the work of Sohl-Dickstein et al. [56], Goyal et al. [21] described a technique for learning a model with learned iterative generation steps, and found that it could achieve good image samples when trained with a likelihood objective.
items.zh: 基于分数的生成模型由Song和Ermon [59]引入，作为一种使用数据分布的梯度进行建模，然后使用Langevin动力学进行采样的方法。Ho等人 [25]发现了该方法与扩散模型之间的联系，并利用这一联系实现了出色的样本质量。在这一突破性工作之后，许多后续工作取得了更有前景的结果：Kong等人 [30]和Chen等人 [8]证明了扩散模型在音频方面表现良好；Jolicoeur-Martineau等人 [26]发现类似GAN的设置可以改善这些模型的样本；Song等人 [60]探索了利用随机微分方程技术来提高基于分数的模型样本质量的方法；Song等人 [57]以及Nichol和Dhariwal [43]提出了提高采样速度的方法；Nichol和Dhariwal [43]以及Saharia等人 [53]在使用上采样扩散模型处理困难的ImageNet生成任务时展示了有前景的结果。与扩散模型相关，继Sohl-Dickstein等人 [56]的工作之后，Goyal等人 [21]描述了一种通过学习迭代生成步骤来学习模型的技术，并发现当使用似然目标进行训练时，该技术可以获得良好的图像样本。

items.en: One missing element from previous work on diffusion models is a way to trade off diversity for fidelity. Other generative techniques provide natural levers for this trade-off. Brock et al. [5] introduced the truncation trick for GANs, wherein the latent vector is sampled from a truncated normal distribution. They found that increasing truncation naturally led to a decrease in diversity but an increase in fidelity. More recently, Razavi et al. [51] proposed to use classifier rejection sampling to filter out bad samples from an autoregressive likelihood-based model, and found that this technique improved FID. Most likelihood-based models also allow for low-temperature sampling Ackley et al. (1985), which provides a natural way to emphasize modes of the data distribution (see Appendix G).
items.zh: 先前关于扩散模型的工作中缺少的一个要素是权衡多样性与保真度的方法。其他生成技术为此权衡提供了自然的杠杆。Brock等人 [5]引入了GAN的截断技巧，其中潜在向量从截断正态分布中采样。他们发现增加截断自然会导致多样性下降但保真度提高。最近，Razavi等人 [51]提出使用分类器拒绝采样来过滤自回归似然模型中的不良样本，并发现该技术改善了FID。大多数基于似然的模型还允许低温采样，这提供了一种强调数据分布模式的自然方式（见附录G）。

items.en: Other likelihood-based models have been shown to produce high-fidelity image samples. VQ-VAE van den Oord et al. (2017) and VQ-VAE-2 Razavi et al. (2019) are autoregressive models trained on top of quantized latent codes, greatly reducing the computational resources required to train these models on large images. These models produce diverse and high quality images, but still fall short of GANs without expensive rejection sampling and special metrics to compensate for blurriness. DCTransformer Nash et al. (2021) is a related method which relies on a more intelligent compression scheme. VAEs are another promising class of likelihood-based models, and recent methods such as NVAE Vahdat and Kautz (2020) and VDVAE Child (2021) have successfully been applied to difficult image generation domains. Energy-based models are another class of likelihood-based models with a rich history Ackley et al. (1985); Dayan et al. (1995); Hinton (2002). Sampling from the EBM distribution is challenging, and Xie et al. [70] demonstrate that Langevin dynamics can be used to sample coherent images from these models. Du and Mordatch [15] further improve upon this approach, obtaining high quality images. More recently, Gao et al. [18] incorporate diffusion steps into an energy-based model, and find that doing so improves image samples from these models.
items.zh: 其他基于似然的模型已被证明能够生成高保真图像样本。VQ-VAE和VQ-VAE-2是在量化潜在编码之上训练的自回归模型，大大减少了在大图像上训练这些模型所需的计算资源。这些模型生成多样且高质量的图像，但如果没有昂贵的拒绝采样和特殊指标来补偿模糊性，仍然不如GAN。DCTransformer是一种相关方法，依赖于更智能的压缩方案。VAE是另一类有前景的基于似然的模型，最近的方法如NVAE和VDVAE已成功应用于困难的图像生成领域。基于能量的模型是另一类具有丰富历史的基于似然的模型。从EBM分布中采样具有挑战性，Xie等人 [70]证明Langevin动力学可用于从这些模型中采样连贯的图像。Du和Mordatch [15]进一步改进了这种方法，获得了高质量的图像。最近，Gao等人 [18]将扩散步骤融入基于能量的模型，并发现这样做改善了这些模型的图像样本。

items.en: Other works have controlled generative models with a pre-trained classifier. For example, an emerging body of work Galatolo et al. (2021); Patashnik et al. (2021); Adverb (2021) aims to optimize GAN latent spaces for text prompts using pre-trained CLIP Radford et al. (2021) models. More similar to our work, Song et al. [60] uses a classifier to generate class-conditional CIFAR-10 images with a diffusion model. In some cases, classifiers can act as stand-alone generative models. For example, Santurkar et al. [55] demonstrate that a robust image classifier can be used as a stand-alone generative model, and Grathwohl et al. [22] train a model which is jointly a classifier and an energy-based model.
items.zh: 其他工作使用预训练分类器控制生成模型。例如，一系列新兴工作旨在使用预训练的CLIP模型优化GAN的潜在空间以匹配文本提示。与我们的工作更相似的是，Song等人 [60]使用分类器生成类别条件的CIFAR-10图像。在某些情况下，分类器可以作为独立的生成模型。例如，Santurkar等人 [55]证明鲁棒的图像分类器可以用作独立的生成模型，而Grathwohl等人 [22]训练了一个同时作为分类器和基于能量模型的模型。

items.en: While we believe diffusion models are an extremely promising direction for generative modeling, they are still slower than GANs at sampling time due to the use of multiple denoising steps (and therefore forward passes). One promising work in this direction is from Luhman and Luhman [37], who explore a way to distill the DDIM sampling process into a single step model. The samples from the single step model are not yet competitive with GANs, but are much better than previous single-step likelihood-based models. Future work in this direction might be able to completely close the sampling speed gap between diffusion models and GANs without sacrificing image quality.
items.zh: 尽管我们认为扩散模型是生成建模极具前景的方向，但由于使用多个去噪步骤（因此需要多次前向传播），它们在采样时仍然比GAN慢。在这方面一个有前景的工作来自Luhman和Luhman [37]，他们探索了将DDIM采样过程蒸馏为单步模型的方法。单步模型的样本尚未能与GAN竞争，但比以前单步基于似然的模型好得多。未来这方面的研究可能能够完全弥合扩散模型与GAN之间的采样速度差距，而不牺牲图像质量。

items.en: Our proposed classifier guidance technique is currently limited to labeled datasets, and we have provided no effective strategy for trading off diversity for fidelity on unlabeled datasets. In the future, our method could be extended to unlabeled data by clustering samples to produce synthetic labels Lucic et al. (2019) or by training discriminative models to predict when samples are in the true data distribution or from the sampling distribution.
items.zh: 我们提出的分类器引导技术目前仅限于带标签的数据集，并且我们没有提供有效的策略来在无标签数据集上权衡多样性与保真度。未来，我们的方法可以通过对样本进行聚类以生成合成标签，或训练判别模型来预测样本是否来自真实数据分布或采样分布，从而扩展到无标签数据。

items.en: The effectiveness of classifier guidance demonstrates that we can obtain powerful generative models from the gradients of a classification function. This could be used to condition pre-trained models in a plethora of ways, for example by conditioning an image generator with a text caption using a noisy version of CLIP Radford et al. (2021), similar to recent methods that guide GANs using text prompts Galatolo et al. (2021); Patashnik et al. (2021); Adverb (2021). It also suggests that large unlabeled datasets could be leveraged in the future to pre-train powerful diffusion models that can later be improved by using a classifier with desirable properties.
items.zh: 分类器引导的有效性表明，我们可以从分类函数的梯度中获得强大的生成模型。这可以用于以多种方式对预训练模型进行条件控制，例如使用带噪声的CLIP版本通过文本描述对图像生成器进行条件控制，类似于最近使用文本提示引导GAN的方法。这也表明，未来可以利用大规模无标签数据集预训练强大的扩散模型，然后通过使用具有理想属性的分类器来改进这些模型。

items.en: We have shown that diffusion models, a class of likelihood-based models with a stationary training objective, can obtain better sample quality than state-of-the-art GANs. Our improved architecture is sufficient to achieve this on unconditional image generation tasks, and our classifier guidance technique allows us to do so on class-conditional tasks. In the latter case, we find that the scale of the classifier gradients can be adjusted to trade off diversity for fidelity. These guided diffusion models can reduce the sampling time gap between GANs and diffusion models, although diffusion models still require multiple forward passes during sampling. Finally, by combining guidance with upsampling, we can further improve sample quality on high-resolution conditional image synthesis.
items.zh: 我们已经证明，扩散模型作为一类具有固定训练目标的基于似然的模型，可以获得比最先进GAN更好的样本质量。我们改进的架构足以在无条件图像生成任务上实现这一点，而我们的分类器引导技术使我们能够在类别条件任务上实现这一点。在后一种情况下，我们发现分类器梯度的尺度可以调整以权衡多样性与保真度。这些引导扩散模型可以减少GAN与扩散模型之间的采样时间差距，尽管扩散模型在采样时仍然需要多次前向传播。最后，通过将引导与上采样相结合，我们可以进一步改善高分辨率条件图像合成的样本质量。

items.en: We thank Alec Radford, Mark Chen, Pranav Shyam and Raul Puri for providing feedback on this work.
items.zh: 我们感谢Alec Radford、Mark Chen、Pranav Shyam和Raul Puri对本工作提供的反馈。
